changeSet.author: bekhruz_web
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hh_db_liquibase_schema.databasechangelog (ID, AUTHOR, FILENAME, DATEEXECUTED, ORDEREXECUTED, EXECTYPE, MD5SUM, DESCRIPTION, CONTEXTS, LIQUIBASE, TAG, DEPLOYMENT_ID) VALUES ('v1.0.2-tag', 'a1549a (generated)', 'db/changelog/db.changelog-v1.0.2-baseline.xml', NOW(), 2, 'EXECUTED', '8:5b8e9098120479e10f73843a2edf434d', 'tagDatabase', NULL, '4.20.0', 'baseline-v1.0.2', 1), ('v1.0.2-baseline-all', 'a1549a (generated)', 'db/changelog/db.changelog-v1.0.2-baseline.xml', NOW(), 3, 'EXECUTED', '8:179567e630625a6b35bc1bc8d9297a34', 'createTable (all existing)', NULL, '4.20.0', NULL, 1);
